name: Impossible Brownie Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease pie plate, 9x1-1/4".
3. Beat eggs, margarine and chocolate together until smooth, for 10 seconds in a blender on high or 30 seconds with a hand mixer.
4. Add brown sugar, Bisquick and granulated sugar. Mix until smooth, for 1 minute in a blender on high (stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides) or 2 minutes with a hand mixer.
5. Pour mixture into the plate and sprinkle with nuts.
6. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean; about 35 minutes.
7. Cool.
